name: ΩVERSE — RPG
description:
ABO — RPG

You know you've got me in your pocket

You don't just have to wait around

You know I keep you in my locket

Just come here and we can settle down

Step into a world where secondary genders shape the dynamics of everyday life. In ΩVERSE — RPG, you’ll navigate the challenges and joys of modern society as an Alpha, Beta, or Omega. Forge friendships, pursue romance, and carve your path in a bustling, slice-of-life setting where instincts, careers, and relationships intertwine. Will you thrive in harmony or stir up chaos? The choice is yours in this immersive and heartfelt omegaverse experience!

Based in other omegaverse bots of this site, everything that they have, there's here! Kudos to them! :)
creator: HeavenlyGay
